meaning: adj.未准备好的,时机未熟的
examples: Shoppers should consider fake foning anytime they spot a talky neighbor in the produce department pinching unripe peaches.
Ripe ripe fruits taste good. Unripe fruits usually taste bad.
Concentrated amounts can especially be found in unripe papaya.
The watch in my left back pocket is a malignant tumor, an unripe boil.
Ripe fruit, fortunately, have a greater effect than unripe ones.
